en.name: Fillomino
en.desc: Divide the grid into regions! Fill each cell with a number equal to its region size. Same-sized regions cannot share an edge. A polyomino puzzle!
en.howToPlay: Click a cell and enter a number (1-9). Same numbers must form connected regions. Each region size must equal its number. Different regions with the same number cannot touch.
tips: Given numbers are anchors - regions must match their value
Small regions (1, 2) are easiest to place first
Watch for conflicts where same-numbered regions would touch
Count cells carefully - each region needs exactly its number of cells

zh.name: 填满分
zh.desc: 将网格划分为区域！每个格子填入等于其区域大小的数字。相同大小的区域不能共享边。多连块谜题！
zh.howToPlay: 点击单元格并输入数字（1-9）。相同数字必须形成连通区域。每个区域的大小必须等于其数字。不同区域不能有相同数字且相邻。
tips: 给定数字是锚点——区域必须匹配其值
注意相同数字区域可能接触的冲突
仔细计数——每个区域需要恰好其数字数量的格子
